# Anti-VEGF Treatment Outcomes 2025

## Overview

This report summarizes 12-month outcomes for all patients treated with anti-VEGF injections at Sanoptis Zürich during 2025.

## Key Results

- Total patients treated: 847
- Mean number of injections: 7.8 (SD 2.3)
- Mean BCVA change: +6.4 letters (p < 0.001)
- Treatment-naive eyes showed greater gains than previously treated eyes (+8.1 vs +4.2 letters)

## Methodology

All analyses were performed using the intention-to-treat population. Missing data were handled using last observation carried forward (LOCF).

## Next Steps

- Complete 24-month follow-up analysis
- Subgroup analysis by age, baseline BCVA, and lesion type
- Submit abstract to EURETINA 2026
